================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D7 96 76 61 39
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x5A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 25

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x5A
PayloadLen   : 25

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
4B 94 EF 69 00 00 00 00 99 3C 7B 44 9A 30 9F C3 
6E D5 7A 44 10 A7 D3 C4 0F 

[RETURN VALUE]
4B 94 EF 69 00 00 00 00 99 3C 7B 44 9A 30 9F C3 
6E D5 7A 44 10 A7 D3 C4 0F
